evidence_required: pytest run reports showing clean execution after proposed exclusions
forbidden_actions: convert advisory output into binding governance
update binding records without accepted decision
alter security gates without accepted mandate
bypass parser or manifest validation for /axiom:*
treat native CLI approval as Axiom approval
operator_goal: Analyze and streamline the AXIOM testing suite for post-implementation operations
out_of_scope: mutating core runtime code, enabling autonomy, or modifying database triggers
scope: Assess current tests under tests/ directory, identify redundant and legacy test cases (doc checks, v1.13 checklists, inert Telegram, frozen IPC), and propose cleanup action
stop_conditions: protected surface would be touched without accepted mandate
command or artifact schema is invalid
runtime, autonomy, IPC, scheduler, executor, model, network, or security posture would change
completion of suite assessment and task handoff
success_criteria: a complete, clean-running testing suite with redundant files cataloged and prepared for pruning
